description: Local-first olympiad fast-lane benchmark. Solved rows require kernel-disclosed Lean proofs; expected_open rows must not be discharged.

problems.preamble:
def dbl : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 0
  | (n+1) => dbl n + 2

problems.statement: ∀ n : Nat, 2 ≤ n → ∃ x y z : Nat, 0 < x ∧ 0 < y ∧ 0 < z ∧ 4 * (x * y * z) = n * (y * z + x * z + x * y)
